name: PostHogConnector
description: Connects to PostHog for product analytics (event capture, persons, queries, insights, cohorts, dashboards, actions, annotations, experiments) and feature-flag management. Supports US Cloud, EU Cloud, and self-hosted instances. Two API key types: personal_api_key (Bearer header for management) and project_api_key (in-body for /capture/ + /batch/).

install_fields.label: Personal API Key
install_fields.help: From PostHog → Personal Settings → Personal API Keys. Sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>` on every management call (projects, persons, flags, cohorts, insights, queries, dashboards, etc.). Shown once at generation — rotate if lost.

install_fields.label: Project ID
install_fields.help: Numeric project ID. Used as the default project path-segment for every per-project endpoint and as the health-check probe target (`GET /api/projects/{project_id}`).

install_fields.label: Project API Key
install_fields.help: From Project Settings → Project API Key. Required ONLY for capture surfaces (capture_event, batch_capture, identify_person, alias_distinct_ids). Sent inside the JSON body as `api_key` — never as a header. This is the same key shipped in posthog-js client bundles.

install_fields.label: PostHog Host
install_fields.help: https://app.posthog.com (default), https://us.posthog.com (US Cloud explicit), https://eu.posthog.com (EU Cloud), or your self-hosted PostHog URL.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Client-side soft cap. PostHog management API default is 240/min per personal key. Capture endpoints are much higher.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates personal_api_key + project_id and marks the connector installed.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies PostHog API connectivity by fetching the configured project (GET /api/projects/{project_id}).

apis.name: List Projects
apis.description: GET /api/projects — list all projects visible to the personal API key.

apis.name: Get Project
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{project_id} — fetch a single project.

apis.name: Capture Event
apis.description: POST /capture/ — single event with project_api_key embedded in the body.

apis.name: Batch Capture
apis.description: POST /batch/ — list of capture dicts with project_api_key at top level.

apis.name: Identify Person
apis.description: Sends an $identify event — properties are merged into $set on the person.

apis.name: Alias Distinct IDs
apis.description: Sends a $create_alias event to merge two distinct_ids onto one person.

apis.name: List Persons
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/persons — list persons, optionally filtered by search.

apis.name: Get Person
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/persons/{person_id}.

apis.name: List Cohorts
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/cohorts.

apis.name: Get Cohort
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/cohorts/{cohort_id}.

apis.name: List Feature Flags
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/feature_flags — list all flags for a project.

apis.name: Get Feature Flag
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/feature_flags/{flag_id}.

apis.name: Create Feature Flag
apis.description: POST /api/projects/{id}/feature_flags — creates a flag with optional filter groups.

apis.name: List Insights
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/insights — list saved insights (trends, funnels, retention).

apis.name: List Dashboards
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/dashboards.

apis.name: Get Dashboard
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/dashboards/{dashboard_id}.

apis.name: List Actions
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/actions — list saved action definitions.

apis.name: List Annotations
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/annotations — list timeline annotations.

apis.name: List Experiments
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/experiments — list A/B experiments.

apis.name: List Events
apis.description: GET /api/projects/{id}/events — recent events optionally bounded by after/before ISO timestamps.

apis.name: Run HogQL Query
apis.description: POST /api/projects/{id}/query — arbitrary HogQL or insight query.
